about: Conversation log with Deb Marcotte (Corey's mum) — questions asked, answers received, topics explored

conversations.deb_response: I absolutely love this - thanks for the update and you have a great day too

When Corey and his brother Kyle were growing up, we always had two big dogs and two cats. I haven't had any pets for years because I travel between US and Canada. Roadie, Cosmo, Bailey and Sketcher are my grand-dogs.
conversations.learned: 1) Corey has a BROTHER named Kyle (huge correction — we'd been calling Kyle a 'friend'). 2) Family grew up with 2 big dogs + 2 cats. 3) Deb travels US/Canada — no current pets. 4) Grand-dogs: Roadie, Cosmo, Bailey, Sketcher.
No draft exists for 2026-04-08 — pipeline did not run that day.

conversations.question_asked: What is your favourite thing to cook?
conversations.deb_response: I'm excited to be a Grand Mom. I love making turkey dinner with all the trimmings for my family!
conversations.learned: Signature dish: turkey dinner with all the trimmings, made for family. Delighted at being called Grand Mom.

conversations.question_asked: Corey tells me your story right out of high school is absolutely amazing. What did you do the moment you finished school?

known_facts.family: Corey has a brother named Kyle. Deb had two sons. Family historically kept two big dogs + two cats while the boys were growing up.
known_facts.location: Travels between US and Canada — hence no current pets
known_facts.cooking: Signature dish is turkey dinner with all the trimmings for family
known_facts.identity: Loves being called Grand Mom / Grand Mum
